{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323165829492AF804712CDBE5DC57"}"},"total":2245},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535373272177247000","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"爽文，后宫，系统。老作者的书了，写的还是很可以的，很多人说的83章的毒点，感觉并不算什么毒点，有更好的武器，把旧的没放转转上都算好的了，而且主角当时的实力也阻止不了。并且，换了武器后，也能很顺利的引出后文的混沌钟。而且，你拿知名法宝也更容易装一点。总体而言是一本不错的书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754471207,"group_id":"7449716853011647550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NweXWlqxOY76LxCsaFOIlGD4a2f3IBry1Z3fXI4CeckZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/75d28aef95e5481b80f4f3991727aafd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792251&x-signature=e8l1tF%2Bp6gC2wI%2F3vcHRLa%2B%2FSaM%3D","user_id":"2919941649475470","user_name":"刹那279"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2919941649475470","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449716853011647550","book_info":{"abstract":"顾明穿越到了西游世界，成为西游世界的底层一条小蛇妖。

　　深知西游凶险的他，没兴趣和大圣勾肩搭背，也没兴趣到天庭当官，只想找一方洞府，祸害一下各路女妖精。

　　当开始修炼八、九玄功的顾明发现强化面板可以强化肉身后，他似乎看到了一条独属于自己的无敌之路。

　当前来招安顾明的二郎显圣真君挨了一巴掌后，顾明发现西游的画风大变！

　　“什么结拜大哥，你们别污蔑我！我顾明清清白白何时与他们结拜了？”

　　“什么通天大圣，你们这是在诽谤我！”

　　“接受招安？绝不可能！”拒绝了玉帝的招安，顾明反手就抢走了嫦娥！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ca3870cf7ced8949e9aade8b413b856d","author":"萌音芊芊","author_id":"","book_id":"7449716853011647550","book_name":"西游：开局我娶了玉面狐狸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#7070a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7449727703365714494","read_count":"24247","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1058978"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"519","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,反派,西游衍生,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/10892c21cd9374fe9b4ec133a5f22a87~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440309&x-signature=DcLHS5TpysCuAEbrkQmK71Dw9PE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3720345196177420","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"498"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323165829492AF804712CDBE5DC57"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读31小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forw
